# WBest

> Fast & free online tools. No sign-up, no uploads, no tracking.

WBest is a suite of 25 single-purpose online tools, each on its own page and its own domain.

- Free to use: no sign-up, no account, no usage limits, no watermarks, no ads.
- Private by construction: everything is computed in your browser, so your data is never uploaded, logged, or shared.
- Works offline once the page has loaded, and needs no install.
- One self-contained page: no cookies, no tracking, no consent popups.

## Text & Writing

- [Word Counter](https://wbwordcounter.com/): Words, characters, sentences, reading time, and keyword density as you type.
- [Online Notepad](https://notepad.wbest.app/): A private notepad that autosaves to your device, with live word and line counts.

## Calculators

- [Percentage Calculator](https://percentagecalculator.wbest.app/): Percent of a number, increase/decrease, discounts, and tips. Formula included.
- [BMI Calculator](https://bmicalculator.wbest.app/): Body mass index in metric or imperial, with your WHO category and healthy range.
- [Loan Calculator](https://loancalculator.wbest.app/): Monthly payment, total interest, and a full amortization schedule for any loan.
- [Car Depreciation Calculator](https://cardepreciation.wbest.app/): What your car will be worth, and what owning it really costs per year and distance driven.

## Converters

- [Unit Converter](https://unitconverter.wbest.app/): Convert length, weight, temperature, and 7 more categories, with the formula shown.

## Generators

- [Password Generator](https://passwordgenerator.wbest.app/): Strong random passwords, passphrases, and PINs with time-to-crack estimates.
- [QR Code Generator](https://qrcode.wbest.app/): QR codes for links, Wi-Fi, vCards, and more. No watermark, never expire.
- [Random Number Generator](https://randomnumbergenerator.wbest.app/): Secure random numbers, dice, coin flips, and pick-from-a-list draws.
- [Barcode Generator](https://barcodegenerator.wbest.app/): Code 128 and EAN-13 barcodes with check digits, as PNG or print-ready SVG.

## Developer

- [JSON Formatter](https://jsonformatter.wbest.app/): Format, minify, and validate JSON with exact error locations and a tree view.
- [Hash Generator](https://hashgenerator.wbest.app/): MD5, SHA-1, and SHA-256/512 for text or files, hashed locally and never uploaded.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://timestampconverter.wbest.app/): Convert epoch timestamps to dates and back, in UTC and your local time zone.
- [Regex Tester](https://regextester.wbest.app/): Test regular expressions live with match highlighting, groups, and replace.
- [Base64 Encoder & Decoder](https://base64.wbest.app/): Encode and decode Base64 with correct UTF-8, URL-safe output, and files.

## Image & Media

- [Image Compressor](https://imagecompressor.wbest.app/): Compress, resize, and convert JPEG, PNG, and WebP to an exact target size.
- [Color Converter & Picker](https://colorconverter.wbest.app/): Convert HEX, RGB, HSL, and OKLCH, with tints, shades, and color harmonies.
- [Image Cropper](https://imagecropper.wbest.app/): Crop to any aspect ratio or exact pixel size, then rotate, flip, and export.
- [Image Color Picker](https://imagecolorpicker.wbest.app/): Pick exact HEX, RGB, and HSL from any photo, with a magnifier and palette.

## Time & Date

- [Age Calculator](https://agecalculator.wbest.app/): Exact age in years, months, and days, plus a countdown to your next birthday.
- [Timer](https://timer.wbest.app/): Countdown timer and stopwatch with presets, laps, and an alarm.
- [Time Zone Converter](https://timezoneconverter.wbest.app/): Compare times across cities with a meeting planner and automatic daylight saving.

## Device Tests

- [Mic Test](https://mictest.wbest.app/): Check your microphone with a live level meter, waveform, and playback.
- [Webcam Test](https://webcamtest.wbest.app/): Check your camera with a live preview, real resolution and frame rate, and a snapshot.

## Frequently asked questions

### Are these online tools really free?

Yes. Every tool is completely free, with no accounts, subscriptions, usage limits, or watermarks. Each one is a single lightweight page that costs almost nothing to run, so free stays free.

### How do the tools keep my data private?

Every tool runs entirely in your browser using JavaScript. Your text, passwords, images, and QR data are processed on your device and never uploaded, logged, or shared. You can verify it yourself: the tools keep working even with your internet connection switched off.

### Do the tools work offline?

Yes. Each tool is a single self-contained page with no server calls, so once it has loaded it keeps working without a connection. You can even save a page to your device and use it anywhere.

### Do I need to create an account or install anything?

No. There is nothing to sign up for, no email to enter, and no app to install. Every tool works instantly in any modern browser on desktop, tablet, and mobile.
